authors: Jose Mari Hall Lanuza Rossine Lyandre Yao C. Fallorina
raw_title: Against All Odds: Journalist Resistance against State Disinformation in the Philippines
title_en: Against All Odds: Journalist Resistance against State Disinformation in the Philippines
title_zh: 逆流而上：菲律宾记者对国家虚假信息的抵抗
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了菲律宾记者如何面对国家制造的虚假信息，坚持报道真相。尽管面临巨大压力，记者们通过多种方式抵抗，维护新闻自由。
plain_summary_en: This article examines how journalists in the Philippines confront state-created disinformation and persist in reporting the truth. Despite significant pressure, journalists resist through various means to uphold press freedom.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字时代下，记者在威权环境中对抗国家虚假信息的策略与挑战，关注新闻自由与媒体抵抗的实践。
research_direction_en: Investigates strategies and challenges for journalists resisting state disinformation in authoritarian contexts during the digital age, focusing on press freedom and media resistance practices.
